zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lenthall於1425年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫 崔德時，他的父親John Lenthall32歲，母親Christian Fox26歲。他和Margery Baxter至少有1個兒子。他去世於1450年11月25日在英國英格蘭波克夏貝瑟爾斯 李享年25歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lenthall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 English: nickname, perhaps from Middle English, Old French lentil ‘lentil’, perhaps given to someone who grew or sold lentil seeds, used in cooking.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lenthall was born in 1425, in Wigmore Hundred, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Lenthall, was 32 and his mother, Christian Fox, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Margery Baxter. He died on 25 November 1450, in Bessels Leigh, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lenthall est né en 1425, à Wigmore Hundred, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lenthall, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Christian Fox, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margery Baxter. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1450, à Bessels Leigh, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lenthall(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어 헌드레드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lenthall(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Fox(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margery Baxter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 베셀스 리에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lenthall родился в 1425 г. в местности вигмор хундред, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Lenthall было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Fox, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margery Baxter. Он умер 25 ноября 1450 г. в местности бесселс лиг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.
